content:
Build a React app called CownIt (tagline: "Commit & Own It"). Set up a clean top navigation bar with the logo on the left and a role switcher on the right with three buttons: Individual, HR, CEO. Default to Individual role. Use a flat, professional design — white surfaces, 0.5px borders, no gradients or shadows. Sidebar navigation that changes based on active role.
Make sure that the visuals and the fonts, icons are pleasant and relevant size
And are world class...
MAKE THE APP FOR BOTH iOS and Android
